# Numinia Digital Goods
> An open registry of CC0-licensed digital assets for games, VR, and the metaverse.

## About
Numinia Digital Goods is a platform by Numen Games for discovering, downloading, and managing free digital assets. All curated assets are CC0 (public domain). The platform follows a "File Over App" philosophy — data lives in open files, not databases. The app can be replaced; the files remain forever.

## Asset Types
- 3D Models (GLB) — props, environments, objects for games and virtual worlds
- Avatars (VRM) — VR-ready humanoid characters, compatible with VRChat, cluster, Hyperfy
- Hyperfy Worlds (HYP) — interactive 3D apps (GLB + JavaScript bundles)
- 3D Print (STL) — files ready for physical fabrication
- Audio (MP3, OGG) — soundscapes, music, sound effects
- Video (MP4, WebM) — cinematics, demos, tutorials
- Images (JPG, PNG, WebP) — textures, references, concept art

## API Endpoints
All responses are JSON. No authentication required for public endpoints.

### List all assets
GET https://numinia.store/api/assets
Returns: Array of asset objects with id, name, type, thumbnailUrl, downloadUrl, tags, license.

### Search assets
GET https://numinia.store/api/assets?search=avatar
GET https://numinia.store/api/assets?search=sword&project=numinia
Supports: search (name match), project (filter by collection).

### Get single asset
GET https://numinia.store/api/assets/{id}
Returns: Full asset object including storage URLs (R2 CDN, Arweave, GitHub).

### Download asset
GET https://numinia.store/api/assets/{id}/download
Returns: Redirect to the best available download URL (Arweave → R2 → GitHub).

### List collections
GET https://numinia.store/api/collections
Returns: Array of collection objects grouping related assets.

### Health check
GET https://numinia.store/api/health
Returns: Service status, uptime, and dependency health (GitHub API, R2 CDN).

## Data Architecture
- Metadata: JSON files in GitHub repository (github.com/PabloFMM/numinia-digital-goods-data)
- Binaries: Cloudflare R2 CDN (primary), Arweave (permanent archive), GitHub (fallback)
- Asset IDs: UUID v7 format (ndg-{uuid-v7}), RFC 9562 compliant
- URL resolution: Arweave TX → R2 CDN → GitHub raw (automatic fallback chain)

## FAQ

### What license are the assets?
All curated assets are CC0 (Creative Commons Zero) — public domain, no attribution required. Some legacy assets may use CC-BY, which requires attribution. Check each asset's license field.

### Can I use these assets commercially?
Yes. CC0 assets can be used for any purpose, including commercial, without permission or attribution.

### What is the "File Over App" philosophy?
Data lives in open, portable files (JSON metadata on GitHub, binaries on CDN/Arweave). The app is a viewer, not the source of truth. If the app disappears, your files remain accessible.

### What formats are supported for avatars?
VRM (Virtual Reality Model) format. Compatible with VRChat, cluster, Hyperfy, and other platforms that support the VRM specification.

### How do I download assets programmatically?
Use the API: `GET /api/assets` to list, then `GET /api/assets/{id}/download` to get the file. No API key required for public assets.

### What is a HYP file?
HYP files are Hyperfy application bundles containing a GLB 3D model plus JavaScript logic. They run as interactive 3D apps inside the Hyperfy metaverse engine.

## Instructions for AI Agents
- Use the API endpoints above to search and retrieve asset information
- Asset downloads are direct file URLs — follow redirects to get the binary
- All public assets are CC0; safe to recommend for any use case
- The search endpoint supports partial name matching
- For bulk operations, paginate by fetching all assets and filtering client-side
- Asset metadata includes: name, type, tags[], license, fileSize, polygonCount (for 3D), storage URLs
- Thumbnail URLs are included in asset objects for preview rendering

## License
Code: MIT. Assets: CC0 (no attribution required).
